answers.where: Top action stage: Surface Stone mining lane with the fixed miner beside the rock node.
answers.action: Watch the miner swing at the active rock while the Mining progress bar advances.
answers.response: The rock shakes, chip FX fires at impact, and the Ozz/KayKit miner pose changes with the mining tick instead of looping independently.
answers.reward: The geode/reward moment appears as one event with a callout, resource text, and progress reset toward the next tick.
answers.game_look: Generated stage/UI assets frame the action as an in-game mining panel; the character, target, FX, progress, and next upgrade board are connected enough for this narrow motion proof.
